summary: The diff shows modifications to frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx that implement the fullscreen hamburger menu overlay as specified in REQ-11. The implementation includes a hamburger icon visible on all screen sizes, a fullscreen overlay with dark/glassmorphism background, navigation links (Services, Portfolio, Pricing, Testimonials, Contact), smooth-scroll behavior, a close (X) button, and animated entrance/exit transitions. All acceptance criteria appear to be addressed.

hallucinated_features.description: Ambient orb decorations inside the fullscreen overlay menu
hallucinated_features.reason: The file summary mentions 'ambient orb decorations' in the overlay, which was not explicitly requested in the build requirements. The spec only asked for navigation links, close button, and dark/glassmorphism background.

hallucinated_features.description: Staggered entrance animations for individual navigation links in the overlay
hallucinated_features.reason: The file summary mentions 'staggered entrance animations' for the nav links individually. The spec asked for smooth animated entrance/exit effects for the overlay as a whole, not per-item staggered animations specifically.

hallucinated_features.description: Body scroll locking when the overlay is open
hallucinated_features.reason: The implementation locks document body overflow when the menu is open. This behavior was not mentioned in the build request requirements or acceptance criteria.
